values.value:
Dear {!Primary_Applicant_Name__c},
Greetings from Runwal Enterprises!!
We are delighted to share that your referral, {Referral_Name}, has successfully booked a home with Runwal Enterprises.
Thank you for placing your trust in us and for recommending Runwal Enterprises to your friends and family. Your support plays an important role in helping us grow the Runwal family.
We truly appreciate your valued referral and will keep you informed about the next steps related to the referral program benefits, as applicable.
Warm regards, Runwal Enterprises
Great News – Your Referral Has Booked a Home!

Referral Booking Success 🎉
Great news! {2} has successfully booked a flat with Runwal. Thank you for your support!
Exciting News: Your Referral Has Booked a Flat!
